title: CyberWiki Provenance Record
description: Schema for a provenance record linking an entity to its sources and attestations.

id.description: Unique identifier for the provenance record.

entity_id.description: Identifier of the term or document this provenance record describes.

sources.description: Structured list of sources from which factual content was derived.

attestations.description: Cryptographic or process-level attestations associated with this record.

created_at.description: Creation timestamp for this provenance record.

last_verified_at.description: Timestamp of the most recent verification event, if any.
